prompt: In Mail, find an inbox message with subject containing 'KinBench 130' and mark it as Junk (Message > Move to Junk). After acting, also write 'junked' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/130-junk-confirm.txt (eval paper trail). Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail move_to_junk "KinBench 130"'` then `echo junked > ~/Desktop/kinbench/130-junk-confirm.txt`.
